description_long: This object is a modern flat-screen television with a large, rectangular display and a slim profile. The front face is dominated by a smooth, black screen, likely made of glass or a similar material, surrounded by a thin bezel. The back and sides appear to be constructed from matte black plastic or metal, contributing to its sleek and minimalist design. A central support or mounting bracket is visible extending from the rear, suggesting it can be wall-mounted or placed on a stand. There are no visible buttons, logos, or ports on the exterior surfaces shown, indicating a clean and contemporary aesthetic. The overall build is typical of high-definition televisions found in urban environments, such as public spaces, offices, or residential living rooms.
description: A sleek, modern flat-screen television with a large black display, thin bezel, and a central rear mounting bracket. The design is minimalist with no visible buttons or ports.
description_view_0: The television is seen from the front, showing a wide, flat black screen with a thin bezel and no visible controls or branding.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the television's slim profile and the protruding central mounting bracket at the rear.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the mounting bracket and the flat, featureless back panel, with no visible ports or buttons.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again shows the thin profile and the mounting bracket extending from the back.
